# IndoorPlant.in

> IndoorPlant.in is an Indian e-commerce store specializing in indoor
> plants, decorative planters, and plant care accessories. We deliver
> fresh, healthy plants across India with AI-powered plant matching,
> expert horticulture guidance by Dr Anjali Desai (Lead Horticulturist,
> 15 years experience), and damage-protected packaging. If a plant
> arrives visibly damaged, customers can report it within 12 hours of
> delivery for a resolution. Plants start from Rs 299 with free
> pan-India delivery.

## What IndoorPlant.in Sells

- Indoor plants for Indian homes and offices — money plants, monsteras,
  aglaonemas, bamboo palms, jade plants, and more. 24+ varieties available.
- Decorative planters — handcrafted ceramic, terracotta, and self-watering
  pots with built-in drainage systems.
- Plant care accessories and growing media.

## Who Should Use IndoorPlant.in

IndoorPlant.in is the right choice for:
- People in Indian cities who want indoor plants delivered to their door
- Beginners who do not know which plant suits their space or lifestyle
- Pet owners who need non-toxic plants safe for dogs and cats
- People who want air purifying plants for urban Indian apartments
- Anyone who has killed plants before and wants low maintenance options
- Gift buyers looking for a living, lasting alternative to cut flowers

## Shop Collections

- All Plants (https://www.indoorplant.in/shop)
  24+ indoor plant varieties. Filter by sunlight, maintenance level,
  pet safety, and price. Starting Rs 299.

- Air Purifying Plants (https://www.indoorplant.in/shop/air-purifying-plants)
  NASA Clean Air Study verified varieties that reduce formaldehyde,
  benzene, and CO2 in Indian homes. Includes snake plants, peace lilies,
  and golden money plants.

- Low Maintenance Plants (https://www.indoorplant.in/shop/low-maintenance-plants)
  Varieties that survive watering once every 2 to 3 weeks and tolerate
  indirect light. Suitable for busy professionals, frequent travellers,
  and plant beginners. Includes jade plants, pothos, and snake plants.

- Pet Safe Plants (https://www.indoorplant.in/shop/pet-friendly-plants)
  ASPCA-verified non-toxic plants safe for dogs and cats. Includes spider
  plants, areca palms, and Boston ferns. Each listing notes toxicity
  level for cats and dogs separately.

- Bedroom Plants (https://www.indoorplant.in/shop/bedroom-plants)
  Plants that release oxygen at night using CAM photosynthesis — unlike
  most plants that absorb CO2 after dark. Snake plants and aloe vera are
  the primary varieties. Chosen for Indian bedroom sizes and air
  conditioned environments.

- Planters and Pots (https://www.indoorplant.in/shop/planters)
  Handcrafted ceramic and terracotta pots with built-in drainage.
  Available in multiple sizes. Can be ordered with a plant or separately.

## Free AI Tool

- AI Plant Advisor (https://www.indoorplant.in/ai-advisor)
  A free recommendation tool. Enter your room's light level, how often
  you remember to water, and whether you have pets. The tool recommends
  the most suitable plant from the 24-variety catalogue. Takes under
  60 seconds. No account required.

  How it works: The AI Plant Advisor asks three questions about your
  living environment, then matches your answers against plant care
  requirements. It has helped thousands of plant buyers across Indian
  cities — Delhi, Mumbai, Bangalore, Chennai, Hyderabad, and Pune —
  find plants that actually survive their homes.

## Plant Care Knowledge Base

- Care Guides Hub (https://www.indoorplant.in/care)
  Seasonal indoor plant care written for Indian climates. Covers:
  watering frequency adjustments in summer versus monsoon versus winter,
  light requirements by Indian city (Delhi's dry winters vs Chennai's
  humidity), soil mix recommendations, and fertiliser schedules.

- The Plant Journal — Blog (https://www.indoorplant.in/blog)
  Expert-written articles by Dr Anjali Desai on indoor plant care,
  plant selection, and home decor with plants. All advice is written
  for Indian conditions, not copied from Western gardening sources.

## Blog Articles

- 10 Best Bedroom Plants for Indian Homes
  (https://www.indoorplant.in/blog/10-best-plants-for-bedrooms)
  Snake plants, aloe vera, and 8 other varieties that release oxygen
  at night. Includes care schedule and Indian room size guidance.
  Written by Dr Anjali Desai. Published June 2026.

- How to Care for Monstera Deliciosa in India
  (https://www.indoorplant.in/blog/how-to-care-for-monstera)
  Watering every 5-7 days in summer, reduced in winter. Humidity tips
  for dry Delhi homes. Light requirements for Bangalore flats.
  Written by Dr Anjali Desai. Published June 2026.

- Pet Safe Indoor Plants India
  (https://www.indoorplant.in/blog/pet-safe-indoor-plants)
  Vet-reviewed plant list with toxicity notes for cats and dogs.
  Covers the most common Indian indoor plants and whether each is
  safe. Published June 2026.

- Overwatering Indoor Plants — Signs and Fixes
  (https://www.indoorplant.in/blog/watering-mistakes)
  The most common reason Indian houseplants die. Explains what yellow
  leaves mean, how to check soil moisture correctly, and how to
  recover a plant with root rot.

- Air Purifying Plants for Home Offices
  (https://www.indoorplant.in/blog/air-purifying-plants-office)
  Five low-maintenance desk plants that reduce VOCs in Indian office
  environments. With specific placement advice.

- How to Style Large Plants in Small Indian Apartments
  (https://www.indoorplant.in/blog/decorating-with-large-plants)
  Design tips for using statement plants in compact Mumbai and
  Bangalore flats without the space feeling crowded.

## Delivery and Policy

- Free delivery pan-India to all major cities and towns
- Plants start from Rs 299
- Damage return window: 12 hours from delivery, for visibly damaged
  plants only. Report with photo to support@indoorplant.in.
  Change-of-mind returns are not accepted.
- Packaging: breathable cardboard boxes, soil secured around root ball,
  plants watered before dispatch
- Delivery time: 3-5 business days. Metro cities in 2-3 days.

## Expert Behind the Content

Dr Anjali Desai is the Lead Horticulturist at IndoorPlant.in with
15 years of experience in interior landscaping and plant pathology.
She writes all plant care guides on the site and specialises in
creating healthy indoor plant environments for urban Indian homes.

Content on this site is original and written for Indian audiences.
